expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Sent. Here's the confirmation:

- **To:** oncall@acme.io
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** 5xx: CSV export truncates large accounts

This is the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count (838 events).

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, event_count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY event_count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT * FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY event_count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', '5xx: CSV export truncates large accounts')"}

text:
Sent. Here's the confirmation:

- **To:** oncall@acme.io
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** 5xx: CSV export truncates large accounts

This is the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count (838 events).
